programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Ruzek's investigation into a mysterious VHS tape found among his father's belongings has unexpected consequences, sending the Intelligence Unit scrambling to uncover the truth behind a cold case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there; Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim's secret under the pressure of cross-examination.

programme.desc: The team races to find Nancy Albright, a person with a drug addiction searching for a new type of high; back at the Command Center, the team is also forced to come to terms with new revelations about once-trusted individuals.

programme.title: Live: Horse Racing
programme.desc: Three-year-old fillies compete in this Grade 1 stakes race for the $846,300 winner's share of a $1.5 million purse. The race currently covers 1 and 1/8 miles and is held at Churchill Downs in Louisville, Ky.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Anchored by Lester Holt, "Dateline" is NBC's signature newsmagazine, bringing viewers storytelling at its best by putting the pieces together to present the full picture of real-life events. NBC News correspondents cover compelling stories and issues of the day, ranging from mystery and crime to in-depth investigations and breaking-news events.
